candidate_definition_hints.text: CKAN is an open-source DMS (data management system) for powering data hubs and data portals. CKAN makes it easy to publish, share and use data. It powers catalog.data.gov, open.canada.ca/data, data.humdata.org among many other sites.
CKAN: The Open Source Data Portal Software

candidate_glosses.text: CKAN: The Open Source Data Portal Software

source_context_snippet: CKAN: The Open Source Data Portal Software
